case_title: HECTOR RENE ARRIAZA HERNANDEZ VS. MARICELA PEREZ, INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DOING et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, HECTOR RENE ARRIAZA AS TO DEFENDANT MARICELA PEREZ, INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DOING BUSINESS AS MARCELLA'S PIZZA BISTRO DOING BUSINESS AS GIOVANNI'A PIZZA BISTRO RICARDO PEREZ, INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DOING BUSINESS AS MARCELLA'S PIZZA BISTRO DOING BUSINESS AS GIOVANNI'A PIZZA BISTRO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
